comment: Minimal finding — no useful content at all

Mid-range: decent length and structure but vague language, no file refs

finding.issue: Null pointer might occur in user validation logic
finding.details: The validation step does not handle null inputs
finding.recommendation: Add a null check before calling validate()

comment: Good clarity with file path but vague word; excellent actionability with exact change

finding.issue: SQL injection vulnerability in src/api/users.py query builder
finding.details: The raw SQL concatenation could allow user input injection on line 42
finding.recommendation: Replace raw SQL with parameterized queries in src/api/users.py

comment: Excellent on both: specific, no vague words, file paths, code snippet, action verb

finding.issue: Missing input validation in src/auth/login.py allows empty passwords
finding.details: The login handler at line 23 accepts empty string passwords without checking length
finding.recommendation: Add a length check in `src/auth/login.py` to reject empty passwords: `if len(password) == 0: raise ValueError`
